##NAMES=Amphibole
##RRUFFID=R110203
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=
##LOCALITY=Bear Lake diggings, Tory Hill, Monmounth Township, Haliburton Co., Ontario, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Black hexagonal prism, note that amphiboles from here are characterized by Hawthorne et al (2006)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110203
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.9104 b: 18.112 c: 5.3182 alpha: 90 beta: 104.936 gamma: 90 volume: 922.3 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
